race.comment: Tough. WHATDOYA MEAN (1) was in the money two starts back at Swan Hill but was unable to repeat the effort last time when tenth, beaten 8 lengths, at Echuca over 1200m after being prominent at the corner. He's won here which is key and his best form reads well. EL SALTO (2) was below his best last time when sixth over 1000m at this track, beaten 6 lengths. Suited back in class a fair way here and should be right there. MUM 'N' ME (7) showed good speed here last time over 1000m until tiring late and finishing seventh, beaten 8 lengths. Gear changes made now and could improve. TOMANADO (3) bounced back to winning form at Narrandera last start and rates a chance in this field.
